title: Unlocking large scale AI training networks with MRC (Multipath Reliable Connection)
summary: Unlocking large scale AI training networks with MRC (Multipath Reliable Connection)
whyItMatters: OpenAI introduces MRC (Multipath Reliable Connection), a new supercomputer networking protocol released via OCP to improve resilience and performance in large-scale AI training clusters.
tags: Read primary source and watch for ecosystem impact.
